subsection.heading: Requests for information
subsection.chapeau: For any contract to be let by any Federal agency, such agency shall provide to any small business concern upon its request—

paragraph.content: a copy of bid sets and specifications with respect to such contract;
the name and telephone number of an employee of such agency to answer questions with respect to such contract; and
adequate citations to each major Federal law or agency rule with which such business concern must comply in performing such contract.

subsection.heading: Exempt contracts
subsection.chapeau: Subsection (a) shall not apply to any contract or subcontract under such contract which—

paragraph.content: will be performed entirely outside any State, territory, or possession of the United States, the District of Columbia, or the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico; or
is for services which are personal in nature.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the Small Business Act which comprises this chapter.
